description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male figure dressed in 19th-century attire, including a tall top hat, a long coat, waistcoat, and trousers. The figure stands upright with one hand tucked into his coat and the other resting at his side, exuding a sense of confidence and poise. The facial features are finely detailed, with a prominent nose, mustache, and sideburns, and the figure appears to be gazing slightly to the side. The sculpture is mounted on a rectangular plinth, which bears an inscription or nameplate on the front. The surface texture is matte and slightly rough, suggesting it is made from stone or cast metal. The overall form is realistic and life-like, capturing the essence of a historical or notable individual.
description: A realistic sculpture of a 19th-century man in a top hat and long coat, standing on a rectangular plinth with an inscription. The figure is detailed and exudes historical character.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the back of the coat, top hat, and the figure's stance with one hand behind his back.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the facial features, top hat, and the hand tucked into the coat, with the inscription on the plinth visible.
description_view_2: Front-side view emphasizing the figure's posture, facial profile, and the detailed folds of the clothing, with the plinth inscription partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear three-quarter view from the opposite side, showing the back of the figure and the side of the top hat and coat.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
